Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}No one else is gonna be here today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}...But, they said we still can't give you back your Evoker.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 3 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I wasn't expecting them to. That's why I'm in here in the first place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Ah, right. Prolly healed already, huh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Huh, your flowers wilted... The heat must've got to 'em.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Oh, I know. Why don't I go buy you some fresh ones?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Those are cut flowers, right? Whoa... How'd you do that!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I gave them a little bit of my energy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I didn't know your healing powers could do stuff like that! It's like a miracle or something...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}It's nothing special. You have powers too, don't you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}This is just another form they can take.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}But that's about all I've got going for me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Without this power... I'd be a nobody.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I just talk a big game, pretendin' like I'm some kinda hero.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}But in reality... I don't know what the hell I'm fighting for...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}In fact... I don't even really have a good reason to live...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}When I was a kid, I had this silly dream...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}I used to wanna grow up to be a pro baseball player... Pretty stupid, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}But, I guess that's part of bein' a kid.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}I don't remember much from my childhood.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 3 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Being surrounded by white... Everything was white...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}But you've been coming to see me here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 201 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}So I don't mind as much, this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Then... I'll come to see you every day.[n]{f 1 1}
